service.name: Duolingo API (Unofficial)
service.description_for_ai: Duolingo language learning platform data. User stats, streak, XP, language progress, course info. Unofficial public API — no authentication needed for public profiles.
service.access_note: Unofficial API — may change without notice

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get Duolingo user profile: streak, XP, languages learning, level, crown count.

agent_hints.unofficial: This is an unofficial API. Duolingo may change or block it. Use for read-only profile data only.
agent_hints.username: Duolingo username from profile URL: duolingo.com/profile/{username}
